children.text:
Welcome to the Norwegian iConcierge Ports & Tours feature. 

Once onboard, connect to the Norwegian iConcierge WiFi network by choosing NCL_Internet_"Ship Name" to view information on our ports-of-call as well as preview and book shore excursions.

There is no charge to connect to the ship’s WiFi network to use Norwegian iConcierge services. Separate internet access is available at a nominal charge.
